/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libxml_xslt_plugin.dylib -install_name @rpath/libxml_xslt_plugin.dylib CMakeFiles/xml_xslt_plugin.dir/xml_xslt_plugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xml_xslt_plugin.dir/xml_xslt_plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xml_xslt_plugin.dir/Users/slava/QT_PRoj/oop_5/proc_interface.cpp.o -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtXml.framework/Versions/A/QtXml /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
